name: GetService
description: Used for discovery. Broadcast to the network with tagged=0 and target=all-zeros. Each device responds with one or more StateService (3) messages.

name: StateService
description: Reports what services are available and the port each service is on. The only message you care about confirms UDP on a port that is usually 56700 — but do not assume this.

fields.name: service
fields.description: Service type. See Services enum.

fields.name: port
fields.description: Port of the service. Usually 56700.

name: GetHostFirmware
description: Requests the firmware version on the device. Typically used together with StateVersion (33) to determine device capabilities.

name: StateHostFirmware
description: Firmware version on the device. Treat version_major and version_minor as a (major, minor) pair — e.g. (3, 60) > (2, 80). LIFX uses a different major for each device generation.

fields.name: build
fields.description: Timestamp of the firmware as an epoch.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 8 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: version_minor
fields.description: Minor component of the firmware version.

fields.name: version_major
fields.description: Major component of the firmware version.

name: GetWifiInfo
description: Requests the signal strength of the device.

name: StateWifiInfo
description: Signal strength information. The signal field units vary between products; apply the RSSI formula (rssi = floor(10 * log10(signal) + 0.5)) to get a dBm value, then map to quality strings.

fields.name: signal
fields.description: Raw signal value. Apply the RSSI formula to interpret.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 4 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: reserved7
fields.description: 4 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: reserved8
fields.description: 2 reserved bytes, set to 0.

name: GetWifiFirmware
description: First and second generation devices have separate wifi firmware. Requests the version of that firmware.

name: StateWifiFirmware
description: Wifi firmware version. Only relevant for first and second generation LIFX products.

fields.name: build
fields.description: Timestamp when the wifi firmware was created as an epoch.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 8 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: version_minor
fields.description: Minor component of the version.

fields.name: version_major
fields.description: Major component of the version.

name: GetPower
description: Requests the power level of the device.

name: SetPower
description: Sets the power level of the device.

fields.name: level
fields.description: 0 turns the device off; 65535 turns it on.

name: StatePower
description: Current power level. 0 means off; any other value means on. 65535 is full power. During a transition via SetLightPower (117) the value may be anywhere between 0 and 65535.

fields.name: level
fields.description: Current power level of the device.

name: GetLabel
description: Requests the label set on the device.

name: SetLabel
description: Sets the label on the device. The label is displayed as the device name in the LIFX mobile apps.

fields.name: label
fields.description: 32-byte null-terminated unicode string to assign as the device label.

name: StateLabel
description: The label of the device.

fields.name: label
fields.description: 32-byte null-terminated unicode string of the device label.

name: GetVersion
description: Requests the product type of the device. Used with the Product Registry to determine capabilities.

name: StateVersion
description: Product type of the device. Use vendor + product with the Product Registry to determine capabilities.

fields.name: vendor
fields.description: Vendor id. For LIFX products this is 1.

fields.name: product
fields.description: Product id. See the Product Registry.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 4 reserved bytes, set to 0.

name: GetInfo
description: Requests uptime, downtime, and current device time.

name: StateInfo
description: Device uptime, downtime, and current time (the time value from the device is likely inaccurate).

fields.name: time
fields.description: Current time according to the device. Likely inaccurate.

fields.name: uptime
fields.description: Time in nanoseconds the device has been online since last power on.

fields.name: downtime
fields.description: Time in nanoseconds of power-off time, accurate to 5 seconds.

name: SetReboot
description: Instructs the device to reboot, as if it had been power-cycled. No response packet.

name: Acknowledgement
description: Returned when ack_required=1 is set on a message. Confirms the device has processed the command.

name: GetLocation
description: Requests the uuid and label of the location assigned to this device.

name: SetLocation
description: Sets the location information on the device.

fields.name: location
fields.description: 16 bytes representing a UUID. Use the same UUID for all devices in this location.

fields.name: label
fields.description: 32-byte null-terminated unicode string of the location name.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Time of this update as an epoch in nanoseconds.

name: StateLocation
description: Location details set on the device. To resolve the canonical label for a location UUID, send GetLocation (48) to all devices and pick the label with the latest updated_at for each UUID.

fields.name: location
fields.description: 16-byte unique identifier (UUID) of the location.

fields.name: label
fields.description: 32-byte null-terminated unicode string of the location name.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Epoch in nanoseconds of when this location was set on the device.

name: GetGroup
description: Requests the uuid and label of the group assigned to this device.

name: SetGroup
description: Sets the group information on the device.

fields.name: group
fields.description: 16 bytes representing a UUID. Use the same UUID for all devices in this group.

fields.name: label
fields.description: 32-byte null-terminated unicode string of the group name.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Time of this update as an epoch in nanoseconds.

name: StateGroup
description: Group details set on the device. To resolve the canonical label for a group UUID, send GetGroup (51) to all devices and pick the label with the latest updated_at for each UUID.

fields.name: group
fields.description: 16-byte unique identifier (UUID) of the group.

fields.name: label
fields.description: 32-byte null-terminated unicode string of the group name.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Epoch in nanoseconds of when this group was set on the device.

name: EchoRequest
description: Used to check that a device is online and responding.

fields.name: echoing
fields.description: 64 bytes to receive back in the EchoResponse (59).

name: EchoResponse
description: Returns the same bytes that were sent in the EchoRequest (58).

fields.name: echoing
fields.description: 64 bytes, same as specified in the EchoRequest.

name: GetColor
description: Requests the current visual state of the device.

name: SetColor
description: Sets the HSBK value for the light. For devices with multiple zones, sets all zones to this color.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 1 reserved byte, set to 0.

fields.name: hue
fields.description: Hue component of HSBK.

fields.name: saturation
fields.description: Saturation component of HSBK.

fields.name: brightness
fields.description: Brightness component of HSBK.

fields.name: kelvin
fields.description: Color temperature in Kelvin.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Time to transition to new HSBK in milliseconds.

name: SetWaveform
description: Sets the HSBK and waveform values for the light. For devices with multiple zones, treats all zones as one.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 1 reserved byte, set to 0.

fields.name: transient
fields.description: See Waveforms documentation.

fields.name: hue
fields.description: Hue component of HSBK.

fields.name: saturation
fields.description: Saturation component of HSBK.

fields.name: brightness
fields.description: Brightness component of HSBK.

fields.name: kelvin
fields.description: Color temperature in Kelvin.

fields.name: period
fields.description: See Waveforms documentation.

fields.name: cycles
fields.description: See Waveforms documentation.

fields.name: skew_ratio
fields.description: See Waveforms documentation.

fields.name: waveform
fields.description: Waveform type. See Waveform enum.

name: LightState
description: Current visual state of the device and its label. When returned in response to a Set message (102/103/119), this reflects the state before the change.

fields.name: hue
fields.description: Hue component of HSBK.

fields.name: saturation
fields.description: Saturation component of HSBK.

fields.name: brightness
fields.description: Brightness component of HSBK.

fields.name: kelvin
fields.description: Color temperature in Kelvin.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 2 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: power
fields.description: Current power level of the device.

fields.name: label
fields.description: 32-byte null-terminated unicode string of the current label.

fields.name: reserved7
fields.description: 8 reserved bytes, set to 0.

name: GetLightPower
description: Like GetPower (20), returns the current power level of the device.

name: SetLightPower
description: Same as SetPower (21) but allows specifying a transition duration.

fields.name: level
fields.description: 0 turns the device off; 65535 turns it on.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Time to transition to the new state in milliseconds.

name: StateLightPower
description: Current power level of the device.

fields.name: level
fields.description: Current power level.

name: SetWaveformOptional
description: Like SetWaveform (103) but allows preserving parts of the original HSBK during the transition via the set_hue / set_saturation / set_brightness / set_kelvin flags.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 1 reserved byte, set to 0.

fields.name: transient
fields.description: See Waveforms documentation.

fields.name: hue
fields.description: Hue component of HSBK.

fields.name: saturation
fields.description: Saturation component of HSBK.

fields.name: brightness
fields.description: Brightness component of HSBK.

fields.name: kelvin
fields.description: Color temperature in Kelvin.

fields.name: period
fields.description: See Waveforms documentation.

fields.name: cycles
fields.description: See Waveforms documentation.

fields.name: skew_ratio
fields.description: See Waveforms documentation.

fields.name: waveform
fields.description: Waveform type. See Waveform enum.

fields.name: set_hue
fields.description: Use the hue value in this message.

fields.name: set_saturation
fields.description: Use the saturation value in this message.

fields.name: set_brightness
fields.description: Use the brightness value in this message.

fields.name: set_kelvin
fields.description: Use the kelvin value in this message.

name: GetInfrared
description: Requests the current infrared level of the device.

name: StateInfrared
description: Current brightness of the infrared output from the device.

fields.name: brightness
fields.description: Amount of infrared. 0 is no output; 65535 is full output.

name: SetInfrared
description: Changes the current infrared brightness on the device.

fields.name: brightness
fields.description: Amount of infrared to emit. 0 is none; 65535 is maximum.

name: GetHevCycle
description: Requests whether a HEV cycle is running on the device.

name: SetHevCycle
description: Starts or stops a HEV cycle on the device.

fields.name: enable
fields.description: false to stop the cycle; true to start it.

fields.name: duration_s
fields.description: Duration in seconds. 0 uses the default set by SetHevCycleConfiguration (146).

name: StateHevCycle
description: Whether a HEV cycle is running on the device.

fields.name: duration_s
fields.description: Duration in seconds this cycle was set to.

fields.name: remaining_s
fields.description: Duration in seconds remaining in this cycle.

fields.name: last_power
fields.description: Power state before the cycle started. Only relevant if remaining_s > 0.

name: GetHevCycleConfiguration
description: Requests the default HEV cycle configuration on the device.

name: SetHevCycleConfiguration
description: Sets default values for HEV cycles on the device.

fields.name: indication
fields.description: true to run a short flashing indication at the end of the HEV cycle.

fields.name: duration_s
fields.description: Default duration used when SetHevCycle (143) is given 0 for duration_s.

name: StateHevCycleConfiguration
description: Default HEV cycle configuration on the device.

fields.name: indication
fields.description: Whether a short flashing indication runs at the end of an HEV cycle.

fields.name: duration_s
fields.description: Default duration used when SetHevCycle (143) is given 0 for duration_s.

name: GetLastHevCycleResult
description: Requests the result of the last HEV cycle that ran.

name: StateLastHevCycleResult
description: Result of the last HEV cycle that was run.

fields.name: result
fields.description: See LightLastHevCycleResult enum.

name: StateUnhandled
description: Returned by some firmware when the device receives a packet it does not know how to handle. Currently only the LIFX Switch has this behaviour.

fields.name: unhandled_type
fields.description: Type number of the packet that was ignored.

name: SensorGetAmbientLight
description: Requests the current ambient light level. Legacy feature; only supported by a limited number of devices.

name: SensorStateAmbientLight
description: Current ambient light level detected by the device. Legacy; unsupported. If the device is on when this is sent the value will be unreliable — best used when the device is soft off.

fields.name: lux
fields.description: Detected light level in lux.

name: SetColorZones
description: Sets a segment of the strip to an HSBK value. If the device supports extended multizone messages, prefer those.

fields.name: start_index
fields.description: First zone in the segment to change.

fields.name: end_index
fields.description: Last zone in the segment to change.

fields.name: hue
fields.description: Hue component of HSBK.

fields.name: saturation
fields.description: Saturation component of HSBK.

fields.name: brightness
fields.description: Brightness component of HSBK.

fields.name: kelvin
fields.description: Color temperature in Kelvin.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Transition time in milliseconds.

fields.name: apply
fields.description: See MultiZoneApplicationRequest enum.

name: GetColorZones
description: Requests HSBK values for zones. Returns StateZone (503) when only one zone matches, or one or more StateMultiZone (506) messages otherwise. Set start_index=0 and end_index=255 to get all zones.

fields.name: start_index
fields.description: First zone to get information from.

fields.name: end_index
fields.description: Last zone to get information from.

name: StateZone
description: HSBK value of a single zone on the strip.

fields.name: zones_count
fields.description: Total number of zones on the strip.

fields.name: zone_index
fields.description: Zone this packet refers to.

fields.name: hue
fields.description: Hue component of HSBK.

fields.name: saturation
fields.description: Saturation component of HSBK.

fields.name: brightness
fields.description: Brightness component of HSBK.

fields.name: kelvin
fields.description: Color temperature in Kelvin.

name: StateMultiZone
description: A segment of 8 HSBK values on the strip.

fields.name: zones_count
fields.description: Total number of zones on the strip.

fields.name: zone_index
fields.description: First zone represented by this packet.

fields.name: colors
fields.description: HSBK values of the 8 zones this packet refers to.

name: GetMultiZoneEffect
description: Requests the currently running multizone firmware effect.

name: SetMultiZoneEffect
description: Starts a multizone firmware effect on the device.

fields.name: instanceid
fields.description: Unique number identifying this effect.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Effect type. See MultiZoneEffectType enum.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 2 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: speed
fields.description: Time for one cycle of the effect in milliseconds.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Time the effect will run for in nanoseconds.

fields.name: reserved7
fields.description: 4 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: reserved8
fields.description: 4 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: parameters
fields.description: 32 bytes (8 x Uint32) of effect parameters. For MOVE, the second field is a Uint32 Direction enum. Ignored by all other effects.

name: StateMultiZoneEffect
description: Current firmware effect running on the device.

fields.name: instanceid
fields.description: Unique value identifying this effect.

fields.name: type
fields.description: See MultiZoneEffectType enum.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 2 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: speed
fields.description: Time for one cycle of the effect in milliseconds.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Time remaining in the current effect in nanoseconds.

fields.name: reserved7
fields.description: 4 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: reserved8
fields.description: 4 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: parameters
fields.description: 32 bytes of parameters that were used in the request.

name: SetExtendedColorZones
description: Changes HSBK values for all zones in one message. For strips with more than 82 zones, send multiple messages with different zone_index values.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Transition time in milliseconds.

fields.name: apply
fields.description: Whether to apply the change now. See MultiZoneExtendedApplicationRequest enum.

fields.name: zone_index
fields.description: First zone to apply colors from. Use multiple messages for strips with more than 82 zones.

fields.name: colors_count
fields.description: Number of colors in the colors field to apply.

fields.name: colors
fields.description: HSBK values to set on the strip.

name: GetExtendedColorZones
description: Requests HSBK values for every zone. Returns multiple StateExtendedColorZones (512) messages if the strip has more than 82 zones.

name: StateExtendedColorZones
description: HSBK values of the zones specified in the request.

fields.name: zones_count
fields.description: Total number of zones on the strip.

fields.name: zone_index
fields.description: First zone in this packet. Indicates relative positioning for strips with more than 82 zones.

fields.name: colors_count
fields.description: Number of entries in the colors array that map to real zones.

fields.name: colors
fields.description: HSBK values currently set on each zone.

name: GetDeviceChain
description: Requests information about all devices in the chain. For LIFX Tiles up to 5 devices; for the LIFX Candle always 1.

name: StateDeviceChain
description: Information about each device in the chain.

fields.name: start_index
fields.description: Index of the first device in the chain this packet refers to.

fields.name: tile_devices
fields.description: Information for each device in the chain. See Tile structure.

fields.name: tile_devices_count
fields.description: Number of entries in tile_devices that map to real devices.

name: SetUserPosition
description: Sets the position of a device in the chain relative to others. No response packet even if res_required=1.

fields.name: tile_index
fields.description: Device to change, 0-indexed from the device closest to the controller.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 2 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: user_x
fields.description: See Tile Positions documentation.

fields.name: user_y
fields.description: See Tile Positions documentation.

name: Get64
description: Requests HSBK values of all zones in devices in the chain. Returns one or more State64 (711) messages up to the count specified by length.

fields.name: tile_index
fields.description: First item in the chain to get zones from.

fields.name: length
fields.description: Number of tiles after tile_index to get HSBK values from.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 1 reserved byte, set to 0.

fields.name: x
fields.description: X value to start from. Usually 0.

fields.name: y
fields.description: Y value to start from. Usually 0.

fields.name: width
fields.description: Width of each item in the chain. 8 for LIFX Tile; 5 for LIFX Candle.

name: State64
description: Current HSBK values of the zones in a single device.

fields.name: tile_index
fields.description: Index of the device in the chain, 0-based from device closest to the controller.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 1 reserved byte, set to 0.

fields.name: x
fields.description: X coordinate the colors start from.

fields.name: y
fields.description: Y coordinate the colors start from.

fields.name: width
fields.description: Width of each row.

fields.name: colors
fields.description: HSBK values for the zones.

name: Set64
description: Sets up to 64 HSBK values on the device. No response packet even if res_required=1.

fields.name: tile_index
fields.description: Device to change, 0-indexed from the device closest to the controller.

fields.name: length
fields.description: Number of devices in the chain to change starting from tile_index.

fields.name: fb_index
fields.description: Frame buffer index to update. Normally 0 for the visible frame.

fields.name: x
fields.description: X coordinate to start applying colors from. Usually 0.

fields.name: y
fields.description: Y coordinate to start applying colors from. Usually 0.

fields.name: width
fields.description: Width of the square to apply colors to. 8 for LIFX Tile; 5 for LIFX Candle.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Transition time in milliseconds.

fields.name: colors
fields.description: HSBK values to assign to each zone.

name: CopyFrameBuffer
description: Copies zones from one frame buffer to another. Useful for smooth transitions on LIFX Ceiling 26" by staging in a non-visible buffer then copying to the visible one.

fields.name: tile_index
fields.description: Device to change, 0-indexed from the device closest to the controller.

fields.name: length
fields.description: Number of devices to copy, starting from tile_index.

fields.name: src_fb_index
fields.description: Source frame buffer index.

fields.name: dst_fb_index
fields.description: Destination frame buffer index.

fields.name: src_x
fields.description: Origin x for source frame buffer.

fields.name: src_y
fields.description: Origin y for source frame buffer.

fields.name: dst_x
fields.description: Origin x for destination frame buffer.

fields.name: dst_y
fields.description: Origin y for destination frame buffer.

fields.name: width
fields.description: Width of the rectangle to copy.

fields.name: height
fields.description: Height of the rectangle to copy.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Transition time in milliseconds. Only relevant when dst_fb_index is 0.

fields.name: reserved1
fields.description: 1 reserved byte, set to 0.

name: GetTileEffect
description: Requests the firmware effect currently running on the device.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 1 reserved byte, set to 0.

fields.name: reserved7
fields.description: 1 reserved byte, set to 0.

name: SetTileEffect
description: Starts a firmware effect on the device. The Sky effect requires LIFX Ceiling running firmware 4.4 or higher.

fields.name: reserved0
fields.description: 1 reserved byte, set to 0.

fields.name: reserved1
fields.description: 1 reserved byte, set to 0.

fields.name: instanceid
fields.description: Unique number identifying this effect.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Effect type. See TileEffectType enum.

fields.name: speed
fields.description: Time for one cycle in milliseconds.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Time the effect will run for in nanoseconds.

fields.name: reserved2
fields.description: 4 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: reserved3
fields.description: 4 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: skyType
fields.description: Only used on SKY effect. See TileEffectSkyType enum.

fields.name: reserved4
fields.description: 3 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: cloudSaturationMin
fields.description: 1 byte. Only used on SKY effect with CLOUDS. Recommended default is 50.

fields.name: reserved5
fields.description: 3 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: reserved6
fields.description: 24 reserved bytes. Currently ignored by all firmware effects.

fields.name: palette_count
fields.description: Number of colors in palette that are relevant.

fields.name: palette
fields.description: Colors for the effect. For MORPH: palette colors. For SKY: see TileEffectSkyPalette offsets.

name: StateTileEffect
description: Current firmware effect running on the device.

fields.name: reserved0
fields.description: 1 reserved byte, set to 0.

fields.name: instanceid
fields.description: Unique value identifying the request.

fields.name: type
fields.description: See TileEffectType enum.

fields.name: speed
fields.description: Time for one cycle in milliseconds.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Time remaining in the current effect in nanoseconds.

fields.name: reserved1
fields.description: 4 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: reserved2
fields.description: 4 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: skyType
fields.description: Only used on SKY effect.

fields.name: reserved3
fields.description: 3 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: cloudSaturationMin
fields.description: 1 byte. Only used on SKY effect with CLOUDS.

fields.name: reserved4
fields.description: 3 reserved bytes, set to 0.

fields.name: reserved5
fields.description: 24 reserved bytes. Currently ignored by all firmware effects.

fields.name: palette_count
fields.description: Number of colors in palette that are relevant.

fields.name: palette
fields.description: Colors specified for the effect.

name: GetRPower
description: Requests the power state of a relay on a switch device.

fields.name: relay_index
fields.description: The relay on the switch, 0-indexed.

name: SetRPower
description: Sets the power state of a relay on a switch device. Current models do not support dimming — only 0 (off) and 65535 (on) are valid.

fields.name: relay_index
fields.description: The relay on the switch, 0-indexed.

fields.name: level
fields.description: New value of the relay. 0 is off; 65535 is on.

name: StateRPower
description: Current power state of a relay. Current models do not support dimming — only 0 (off) and 65535 (on) are valid.

fields.name: relay_index
fields.description: The relay on the switch, 0-indexed.

fields.name: level
fields.description: Current value of the relay.
